$comment: GENERATED — do not edit. Generated from schema/catalog.json by tool/generate.dart (spike5; emitted by spike3 generateFromCatalog).
title: updateComponents (spike5 catalog)
description: A2UI v0.9-shaped updateComponents message for the spike5 catalog. Always emit the WHOLE component tree; the client reconciles by component id. Exactly one component must have id "root".

surfaceId.description: Identifier of the surface being updated.

components.description: Flat adjacency list of components. Containers reference children by id.

oneOf.description: A pressable leaf control bound to an integer counter held in live client state. Cannot have children. AFFORDS CLIENT ACTIONS: the client may send an A2UI action message with sourceComponentId set to this component's id and one of these action names: "press" — Increment this button's counter by context.amount (integer, optional, default 1). "set" — Overwrite this button's counter with context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

press.description: Increment this button's counter by context.amount (integer, optional, default 1).

set.description: Overwrite this button's counter with context.value (integer, required). Last write wins.

oneOf.description: A leaf component holding a single named string value. Cannot have children and affords no actions.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

oneOf.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

children.description: Ordered ids of child components. Every id must appear as a component in the same components list.
